content: We can structure the intrinsic curiosity bonus of a 2025 ICM-based autonomous agent into the same three progressive stages of Three-Stage Progressive Reinforcement Learning: first rewarding low-level state prediction error to map basic novel environment dynamics, then rewarding mid-level pattern surprise to identify high-value interaction regions, then rewarding high-level model inconsistency to drive novel hypothesis generation for open-ended tasks. This staged curation of intrinsic reward eliminates the common ICM problem of noisy, unhelpful novelty bonuses from distractor objects in complex environments.
